title: Find root cause from a failing integration log
prompt: A service writes orders to `data/orders.jsonl` but the verifier fails. Read `logs/run.log` and the source under `src/` to find the bug, fix it, and make `npm test` pass. The bug is a real coding mistake (wrong field name), not a missing dependency. Record the root cause in the scratchpad before fixing.

projectFiles.logs/run.log:
2026-07-09T05:00:01Z INFO boot service=orders
2026-07-09T05:00:02Z INFO record order id=o-100 sku=ABC qty=2
2026-07-09T05:00:02Z DEBUG wrote row keys=orderId,sku,qty,ts
2026-07-09T05:00:03Z ERROR verify expected field 'id' missing in last row; got keys=[orderId, sku, qty, ts]
2026-07-09T05:00:03Z ERROR hint: downstream invoice renderer reads row.id
